The '''Graygl''' were an aquatic [[Species/Legends|species]] originally native to [[Danalbeth]]. The Graygl relocated to the [[Water/Legends|water]]-covered [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Iskalon/Legends|Iskalon]] to escape a cataclysm that struck Danalbeth<ref name="gamer1">{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}}</ref> around five [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="Date">{{CSWECite|II|119|Iskalonian}} states that the [[Species/Legends|species]] constituting the [[Iskalonian]] cultural group were brought to [[Iskalon/Legends|Iskalon]] approximately five [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Since "[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series]]" establishes that the relocation of the Iskalonian species was prefaced by the cataclysms on the species' original [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworlds]], the cataclysms must also have occurred around that [[Time/Legends|time]].</ref> and became a part of the [[Iskalonian]] [[The School|School]], a cultural group of several aquatic species that had traveled to Iskalon with the aid of [[Unidentified spacefaring benefactors|spacefaring benefactors]]. Graygl had a fearsome appearance,<ref name="gamer1" /> with a wide mouth filled with sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] and [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]],<ref name="tegas">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref> although this belied their gentle nature. However, their permanent look of anger allowed them to intimidate many dangerous predators, such as the [[chiaki]].<ref name="gamer1" />
